You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 24.12 (commit: e01610c0).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA - Bug] Followed P2s feed not showing in drop-down
![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/47797566/e0725f07-6802-477c-9f39-d6bbe0baa8ea)

>While comparing the viewpager tabs and feeds content for before / after, I see a missing menu item for "Followed P2S" (that is a filterable with only Sites and no Tags elements, I think similarly to the Automattic item)

What I was trying to say here is (using the same user for the before/after):
- the "Followed P2s" item is missing in the after

About how to get the Followed P2s on your side, what follows is my best guess
>I think that menu is related to P2 the product sites that I think I created in that account from https://p2help.wordpress.com/getting-started/creating-a-new-workspace/ if it's useful to create the test scenario.

but I can share my test account with you if it's quicker (just dm me in slack 👍 )

_Originally posted by @develric in https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/19856#issuecomment-1881059568_

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

We should also consider adding the analytics event for when this menu item is clicked.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderConstants.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderPostListFragment.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/tracker/ReaderTracker.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat

  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty

  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 14→import javax.inject.Inject
 15→
 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor() {
 17→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 18→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 19→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 20→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 21→            }
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 23→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 26→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 29→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 32→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList
 35→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 36→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 37→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 38→                    }
 39→                    sparseArray
 40→                }
 41→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 42→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 43→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 44→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 45→                }
 46→        }

 5→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext

11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.ReaderUtilsWrapper
12→import javax.inject.Inject
13→import javax.inject.Named
14→
15→/**
16→ * Loads list of tags that should be displayed as tabs in the entry-point Reader screen.
17→ */
18→@Reusable
19→class LoadReaderTabsUseCase @Inject constructor(
20→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
21→    private val readerUtilsWrapper: ReaderUtilsWrapper
22→) {
23→    suspend fun loadTabs(): ReaderTagList {
24→        return withContext(bgDispatcher) {
25→            val tagList = ReaderTagTable.getDefaultTags()
26→
27→            /* Creating custom tag lists isn't supported anymore. However, we need to keep the support here
28→            for users who created custom lists in the past.*/
29→            tagList.addAll(ReaderTagTable.getCustomListTags())
30→
31→            tagList.addAll(ReaderTagTable.getBookmarkTags()) // Add "Saved" tab manually
32→
33→            // Add "Following" tab manually when on self-hosted site
34→            if (!tagList.containsFollowingTag()) {
35→                tagList.add(readerUtilsWrapper.getDefaultTagFromDbOrCreateInMemory())
36→            }
37→
38→            ReaderUtils.getOrderedTagsList(tagList, ReaderUtils.getDefaultTagInfo())
39→        }
40→    }
41→}

  2→
  3→import android.app.PendingIntent.FLAG_CANCEL_CURRENT

  8→import org.wordpress.android.R
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 11→import org.wordpress.android.push.NotificationPushIds.WEEKLY_ROUNDUP_NOTIFICATION_ID
 12→import org.wordpress.android.push.NotificationType.WEEKLY_ROUNDUP
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.Organization
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpackoverlay.JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.notifications.SystemNotificationsTracker
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.StatsTimeframe.WEEK
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stats.refresh.utils.StatsUtils
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.SiteUtilsWrapper
 21→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ContextProvider
 22→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ResourceProvider
 23→import javax.inject.Inject
 24→
 25→class WeeklyRoundupNotifier @Inject constructor(
 26→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 27→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
 28→    private val contextProvider: ContextProvider,
 29→    private val resourceProvider: ResourceProvider,
 30→    private val weeklyRoundupScheduler: WeeklyRoundupScheduler,
 31→    private val notificationsTracker: SystemNotificationsTracker,
 32→    private val siteUtils: SiteUtilsWrapper,
 33→    private val weeklyRoundupRepository: WeeklyRoundupRepository,
 34→    private val appPrefs: AppPrefsWrapper,
 35→    private val statsUtils: StatsUtils,
 36→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper
 37→) {
 38→    fun shouldShowNotifications() = accountStore.hasAccessToken() &&
 39→            siteStore.hasSitesAccessedViaWPComRest() && jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowNotifications()
 40→
 41→    suspend fun buildNotifications(): List<WeeklyRoundupNotification> = coroutineScope {
 42→        siteStore.sitesAccessedViaWPComRest
 43→            .map { async { weeklyRoundupRepository.fetchWeeklyRoundupData(it) } }
 44→            .awaitAll()
 45→            .asSequence()
 46→            .filterNotNull()
 47→            .filter { it.site.organizationId != Organization.A8C.orgId } // Filters A8C P2s
 48→            .filter { appPrefs.shouldShowWeeklyRoundupNotification(it.site.siteId) }
 49→            .sortedByDescending { it.score }
 50→            .take(TOP_FIVE_SITES)
 51→            .filter { it.views >= MIN_SITE_VIEWS }
 52→            .map { buildNotification(it) }
 53→            .toList()
 54→            .reversed()
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    fun onNotificationsShown(notifications: List<WeeklyRoundupNotification>) {
 58→        repeat(notifications.size) {
 59→            notificationsTracker.trackShownNotification(WEEKLY_ROUNDUP)
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        weeklyRoundupScheduler.scheduleIfNeeded()
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun buildNotification(data: WeeklyRoundupData): WeeklyRoundupNotification {
 66→        val context = contextProvider.getContext()
 67→        val site = data.site
 68→        val notificationId = WEEKLY_ROUNDUP_NOTIFICATION_ID + site.id
 69→        return WeeklyRoundupNotification(
 70→            id = notificationId,
 71→            contentIntentBuilder = {
 72→                ActivityLauncher.buildStatsPendingIntentOverMainActivityInNewStack(
 73→                    context,
 74→                    site,
 75→                    WEEK,
 76→                    data.period,
 77→                    WEEKLY_ROUNDUP,
 78→                    notificationId,
 79→                    FLAG_CANCEL_CURRENT or FLAG_IMMUTABLE
 80→                )
 81→            },
 82→            contentTitle = resourceProvider.getString(
 83→                R.string.weekly_roundup_notification_title,
 84→                siteUtils.getSiteNameOrHomeURL(site)
 85→            ),
 86→            contentText = buildContentText(data)
 87→        )
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    private fun buildContentText(data: WeeklyRoundupData) = when {
 91→        data.likes <= 0 && data.comments <= 0 -> {
 92→            resourceProvider.getString(
 93→                R.string.weekly_roundup_notification_text_views_only,
 94→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.views)
 95→            )
 96→        }
 97→        data.likes > 0 && data.comments <= 0 -> {
 98→            resourceProvider.getString(
 99→                R.string.weekly_roundup_notification_text_views_and_likes,
100→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.views),
101→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.likes)
102→            )
103→        }
104→        data.likes <= 0 && data.comments > 0 -> {
105→            resourceProvider.getString(
106→                R.string.weekly_roundup_notification_text_views_and_comments,
107→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.views),
108→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.comments)
109→            )
110→        }
111→        else -> {
112→            resourceProvider.getString(
113→                R.string.weekly_roundup_notification_text_all,
114→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.views),
115→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.likes),
116→                statsUtils.toFormattedString(data.comments)
117→            )
118→        }
119→    }
120→
121→    companion object {
122→        private const val TOP_FIVE_SITES = 5
123→        private const val MIN_SITE_VIEWS = 5
124→    }
125→}
126→

 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor() {
 17→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 18→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 19→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 20→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 21→            }
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 23→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 26→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 29→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 32→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList
 35→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 36→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 37→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 38→                    }
 39→                    sparseArray
 40→                }
 41→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 42→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 43→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 44→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 45→                }
 46→        }
 47→    }
 48→
 49→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 50→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 51→            id = id,
 52→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 53→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 54→        )
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 58→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 59→            id = id,
 60→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 61→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 62→        )
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 66→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 67→            id = id,
 68→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 69→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 70→        )
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 74→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 75→            id = id,
 76→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 77→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 78→        )
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 82→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 83→            id = id,
 84→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 85→        )
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
 89→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
 90→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 91→            customListsMenuItems.add(
 92→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 93→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
 94→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
 95→                )
 96→            )
 97→        }
 98→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
 99→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
100→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
101→            id = "custom-lists",
102→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
103→            children = customListsMenuItems,
104→        )
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
108→
109→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
110→}

 41→    suspend fun buildNotifications(): List<WeeklyRoundupNotification> = coroutineScope {
 42→        siteStore.sitesAccessedViaWPComRest
 43→            .map { async { weeklyRoundupRepository.fetchWeeklyRoundupData(it) } }
 44→            .awaitAll()
 45→            .asSequence()
 46→            .filterNotNull()
 47→            .filter { it.site.organizationId != Organization.A8C.orgId } // Filters A8C P2s
 48→            .filter { appPrefs.shouldShowWeeklyRoundupNotification(it.site.siteId) }
 49→            .sortedByDescending { it.score }
 50→            .take(TOP_FIVE_SITES)
 51→            .filter { it.views >= MIN_SITE_VIEWS }
 52→            .map { buildNotification(it) }
 53→            .toList()
 54→            .reversed()
 55→    }

 57→    fun onNotificationsShown(notifications: List<WeeklyRoundupNotification>) {
 58→        repeat(notifications.size) {
 59→            notificationsTracker.trackShownNotification(WEEKLY_ROUNDUP)
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        weeklyRoundupScheduler.scheduleIfNeeded()
 63→    }

 65→    private fun buildNotification(data: WeeklyRoundupData): WeeklyRoundupNotification {
 66→        val context = contextProvider.getContext()
 67→        val site = data.site
 68→        val notificationId = WEEKLY_ROUNDUP_NOTIFICATION_ID + site.id
 69→        return WeeklyRoundupNotification(
 70→            id = notificationId,
 71→            contentIntentBuilder = {
 72→                ActivityLauncher.buildStatsPendingIntentOverMainActivityInNewStack(
 73→                    context,
 74→                    site,
 75→                    WEEK,
